settings.text: Save time and money with 10% off every order on your caregiving essentials and automatic deliveries to your doorstep
Enjoy automatic deliveries to your doorstep with our free subscription, discreet packaging and anytime cancellation.

settings.title: Fits to Your Schedule
settings.caption: Select the quantity and schedule that works for you

settings.title: Peace of Mind.
settings.caption: Create your subscription. Sitback, relax, we will take care of the rest.

settings.title: You’re in Control.
settings.caption: Skip or cancel anytime. It's that easy!

settings.text: Subscriptions are automatically renewed and the products will be automatically delivered by us after each successful renewal.

• For example, if you started a monthly subscription, then the system will automatically charge your credit card each month and you will get the products to your doorstep each month, without the need to place the order by yourself! In advance of each delivery, we will send you a reminder email showing the items, price and discount for your upcoming delivery.
  • Skip your deliveries or cancel your subscriptions at any time by visiting your account and managing your subscriptions!

settings.title: How does it work?
settings.body: Set up regularly scheduled deliveries and earn savings with Subscribe & Save. You can subscribe to hundreds of caregiving essentials.

settings.title: How do I start a subscription?
settings.body:
Subscribe and Save is available on the following care essentials - incontinence, wipes, and gloves.

Select "Subscribe and Save”.

Select the quantity that works for you.

You will receive a confirmation email informing you that you have just started a subscription. In the confirmation email is also a magic link with which you can access your customer portal.

Skip your deliveries or cancel your subscriptions at any time by visiting the customer portal. The customer portal can be reached via the magic link you received in the email that was sent to you when you placed an initial subscription order with us.

settings.title: How much does it cost?
settings.body: The service is entirely free to use. Our product prices may go up or down, however, by creating an auto re-order you will always benefit from your additional 10% discount.

settings.title: How much can I save?
settings.body: When you activate your subscription, you will receive a 10% discount on all subsequent re-orders. The 10% discount applies to products only and cannot be combined with any additional offer.

settings.title: Can I pause or cancel a subscription?
settings.body:
Yes, of course. You can pause or cancel a subscription any time you want in the customer portal, as seen in the screenshot below. The customer portal can be accessed through the magic link you received in the email that was sent to you when you placed an initial subscription order in the shop.

You can also access your subscriptions if you create an account on the Homecare Medical website.

settings.title: What to keep in mind when rescheduling subscription?
settings.body: Please allow at least 3 working days for delivery when adjusting your billing schedule. For example, if you need your delivery on the 15th of the month, make sure to set your billing schedule date no later than the 12th or earlier if any non-working days fall in between.

settings.title: I rescheduled my subscription and now delivery is late?
settings.body:
When you reschedule your subscription, you are rescheduling your billing date. If the first order is made on the 10th, every next payment will be scheduled on the 10th of the month.

Billing date is different to Delivery Date. Once your credit card is charged, your order needs to be packed and shipped, and you can expect delivery within 3 working days. For example, if you need your delivery by the 15th of the month, make sure to set your billing date no later than the 12th or earlier if there are any non-working days in between.

settings.title: How can I skip or reschedule a charge?
settings.body: You can skip or reschedule the charge in the customer portal. Each scheduled delivery will have a Skip payment button next to it, which you can use to skip the charge. You can reschedule the charge by clicking on the Reschedule button next to the billing date.

settings.title: Can I add products to my subscription?
settings.body: Of course. You can add products to your subscription in the customer portal. Just click on the Edit button in the products card and edit, remove or add products to your subscription.

settings.title: What happens if the payment can't be processed?
settings.body: If the subscription can't be renewed because a payment can't be processed you will receive an email with a link where you can safely update your payment method.

settings.title: What if my delivery address changes?
settings.body:
1. Go to My Account > My subscriptions.
  2. Click ‘edit’ on the right-hand side of your subscription.
  3. Under shipping information, please click ‘edit address’.
  4. Then click ‘Update’ to save your new address.
  5. This change will be applied to your next order.

settings.title: How do I change my order quantity?
settings.body:
1. Go to My Account > subscriptions.
  2. Edit and add items as you wish.
  3. Click ‘Save’.
  4. This will be applied to your next re-order.

settings.title: What if I’m not at home on the delivery day?
settings.body: If there are no specific delivery instructions, the courier will leave a card at your home with their contact details. You can then contact the courier and either re-arrange the delivery or collect the order yourself from the depot.

settings.title: How can I check my subscription?
settings.body: Please go to my account on our website and click on my subscriptions and click billing schedule. Alternatively, contact us on +353 (94) 9633 800 or 0818 911 555 or talk to a customer representative in-store.

settings.title: Price Changes
settings.body: Subscribe & Save provides convenient automatic delivery of your chosen products. Product prices may change from time to time, and any future scheduled orders will be charged at the price in effect when the order is processed. You can review or cancel your subscription at any time before your next order is placed.

settings.title: Terms and Conditions
settings.body: Subscribe and Save products are limited to incontinence, wipes and gloves. The discount will be applied to certain products within that range only. The products that are part of Subscribe and Save are marked with the same badge.

settings.title: Having the confidence to be comfortably you.

settings.text: We pride ourselves in offering the optimum customer service, with a very strong emphasis on quality. We are proud holder of the following ISO certifications.
